{{Infobox group
| name = Sandviper sect
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Sandviper sect Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The Sandviper sect is a group of [[sacred artists]] that maintains an alliance with the [[Jai clan]], specifically collaborating on expeditions within the [[Ruins]]. Their territory within the [[Five Factions Alliance]] was not formally designated but was instead acquired through conquest and occupation. While their leadership resides in a large, ornate red tent, the lower-ranking members live in more modest structures made of scavenged materials and twigs. The sect is known for utilizing insidious, venomous powers capable of dissolving flesh with acid-like properties. Their specific [[madra]] is derived from toxins, poisons, and corrosive elements, a [[Path]] that originated in the swamps as an adaptation to the corruption found in the Wilds. To manage these lethal internal forces and prevent self-inflicted death, members utilize a technique known as the [[Sandviper body]], or more formally, the [[Bloodforged Iron body]]. This practice requires initiates to consume the blood of a [[sandviper]] to help regulate the venom and protect their vital organs.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Located within the [[Desolate Wilds]], the Sandviper sect is a half-civilized group allied with the [[Jai clan]]. Led by a young chief named [[Kral]], the sect's members utilize green madra and a venomous [[aura]]. Their initiates practice the [[Bloodforged Iron body]], and the group includes an individual named [[Gokren]]. During a mission to infiltrate, [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] utilized the sect's specific outfits to blend in.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sandviper sect]] is an ally of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sandviper sect]] has a young chief named [[Kral]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sandviper sect]] members use venomous [[aura]] and green madra.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] wore [[Sandviper sect]] outfits to infiltrate.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sandviper sect]] is led by a chief.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sandviper sect]] uses the [[Bloodforged Iron body]] for its initiates.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sandviper sect]] is a half-civilized sect located in the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sandviper sect]] is a group that includes [[Gokren]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|"Young chief Kral," the Sandviper greeted him, stuttering a little and bowing even more deeply than he had for Jai Long.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
